hooks.command: echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not write .blend files directly. Use the Blender MCP to create assets and export as .glb."}'
echo '{"decision":"block","reason":".import files are auto-generated by Godot. Never write these manually."}'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "Godot AI Toolkit"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Godot AI Toolkit' 'Claude finished' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs input" with title "Godot AI Toolkit"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Godot AI Toolkit' 'Claude needs input' 2>/dev/null || true
